column1: Jane _____ hover the sitting room if Tom moves the furniture.
If they do not study harder, they _____ pass the exam.
If it rains tomorrow, I _____ have to water the plants.
If we liked to go shopping in a big city, we _____ charter a helicopter.
If she had taken the bus, she _____ have arrived on time.
If I had not broken my leg, I _____ have taken part in the contest.
They _____ have missed the last bus if they had hurried.
I _____ finish the work if you don't help me.
She _____ give you a present if you invite her.
If Tim tidies up the kitchen, Ann _____ clean the hall.
